name: agent-validation-matrix
summary: Select and execute relevant deterministic, product, live-agent, Agent SDK, perception, simulator, and map/cleanup-consumer validation gates.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill orchestrates existing public task and harness commands. It does not expose robot capabilities or private evaluator truth.

capability_requirements.notes: Selected gates may require household world, manipulation, episode, visual-grounding, live coding-agent, Agent SDK, or simulator runtime support depending on the matched signals.

scripts.summary: Builds an auditable validation matrix from plan text, git diff files, and explicit axis overrides.
Writes JSON/Markdown/HTML validation manifests and optionally executes runnable selected gates.

refactor_signals: selection rules become hard to audit from deterministic source signals
validation policy starts moving task behavior out of task skills
multiple repos need the same validation matrix contract
